title: PUBLISH_KEY_PACKAGE not rate-limited; broadcasts KEY_PACKAGE_READY to all clients
description: ws.rs PUBLISH_KEY_PACKAGE has no rate limit; each successful publish broadcasts KEY_PACKAGE_READY to all O(N) connected clients — a subscribed client can cause O(N) notification fan-out per call at any rate; distinct from the unbounded blob size issue in nie-kef6.72
